steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says Reiniger and her team worked 'painstakingly' over three years, creating 250,000+ individual images and repeatedly inventing new methods. The blank must capture the demanding, exhausting nature of that work.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘a haphazard’: Means random and careless — the opposite of 'painstakingly.' ✗
  • Choice B — ‘a contentious’: Means involving conflict or dispute — no interpersonal conflict is mentioned in the passage. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘an ineffectual’: Means ineffective or producing no result — contradicts their demonstrated success in completing the film. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘an arduous’: Means extremely difficult and tiring — matches 'painstakingly' and is supported by the years of labor and constant problem-solving. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
